case_title: LORENA GARCIA ET AL VS. FRANCISCO ALEJANDRO COLLAZZO NIEVES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66058375)
